Author: FranFkntastic
Name: MarketMafioso
Punchline: Small, practical FFXIV improvements under one roof.
Description: A small integrated toolbox for practical FFXIV improvements, including inventory reporting, retainer cache export, and workshop logistics. Use /mmf to open settings.
Changelog: Adds Workshop Logistics queues, Craft Architect plan export, VIWI Workshoppa handoff, retainer material restock automation, hosted inventory receiver hardening, and source attribution notes.
